div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in France (Armour)
div.p:
105. Pan American Airways, Incorporated, is planning to extend its system through the countries of the Caribbean to Cayenne and desires to obtain from the French Government permission to fly over French Guiana, also to refuel and make minor repairs, and to deliver
United States mail if awarded concession for that route by the United States Post Office. A representative of the Company is being sent to French Guiana to negotiate permanent operating concession and air mail contract. Please request the French Government to grant temporary authorization valid until replaced by formal contract.
